name: Small HOGE radix-32 INTT/NTT butterfly RTL
description: HOGE p64 radix-32 butterfly reference top, matching one 32-lane half of the 1024-point HOGE NTT decomposition.
implementation_notes: This is not a standalone dense 32-point transform.
The NTT side matches cuHEpp::NTTradixButterfly<5> before final twist/modswitch.
The INTT side matches cuHEpp::INTTradixButterfly<5> before outer twist/table multiplication.

observable_contract.intt: One input cycle with lane i carrying a 64-bit HOGE torus word. One output cycle with lane i carrying cuHEpp::INTTradixButterfly<5> output i.
observable_contract.ntt: One input cycle with lane i carrying a 64-bit HOGE torus word. One output cycle with lane i carrying cuHEpp::NTTradixButterfly<5> output i.
